title: Amtech E0425 2 Piece Wood Plane Set
features: PLANE AND SMOOTH: This lightweight yet sturdy wood plane set includes a 160mm block plane and a 230mm smoothing plane and is ideal for a wide range of woodworking tasks
EASY TO USE: With lightweight handles and easy adjustment of the 40mm steel blades, these block planes are easy to use
SIZE CAPACITY: 160 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
